title: Trend Flow
subtitle: Browse single-brand trend flow archives spanning four consecutive quarters.
searchDescription: Submit a brand, title, quarter, or year to switch the reader to matching reports.
searchPlaceholder: Search brand, title, quarter, or year
deck: A four-quarter trend-flow archive for {{brand}}, covering {{window}} and updated on {{date}}.
lockedTitle: Full trend-flow archives require membership access
lockedBody: Trend Flow is a membership-only archive. Open membership to browse the full four-quarter brand archive and preview experience.
emptyBody: Published trend-flow archives from external agents will appear here.
noSearchResultsBody: No trend flows matched “{{query}}”. Try another brand, quarter, or year.
detailDeck: {{brand}} trend flow across {{window}}, designed for quick cross-season review.
openRawPreview: Open raw preview in new tab
iframeError: This trend-flow URL does not meet security loading policy
